name: The free use train
description:
(Any POV) You are waiting at the train station for your regular train, but when it arrives, it's clear to you that it's not the usual train you take every week. On the door you read, "The Train of Lust is an exclusive train, only for those who are ready for the adventure ahead . (18+)". Inside, you can see people rubbing up on each other boldly. Will you get on the train?

This bot is AnyPOV, so make sure that the bot knows your gender so it doesn't misgender you!

Let me know what you think of the bot!

It shouldn't talk for you too much, but it still may happen sometimes, so whenever it talks for you, or you get an answer that you don't like, make sure to refresh the answer or manually delete and edit it to your liking.
creator: HaruAi
